question.text: If last business day of June is 30th (Monday), what is the expiry date for the June monthly USDINR futures contract?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Expiry = 2 working days prior to the last business day. Last business day = 30th June (Monday). Two working days back: 27th (Friday) and 26th (Thursday). So expiry = 26th June (Thursday) at 12:30 PM. **The Trap:** Count WORKING days backward (excluding weekends and holidays). Saturday and Sunday don't count. **Cross-Exam Context:** Expiry date calculation is frequently tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Always check the holiday calendar — if there's a holiday in between, you need to go back one more working day.
